# Drop by Ciphera

> End-to-end encrypted file sharing. Private, secure, and open-source.

Built by [Ciphera](https://ciphera.net).

## Pages

- [Home](https://drop.ciphera.net/) - Upload and share files securely
- [Why Drop](https://drop.ciphera.net/why) - Our mission and privacy philosophy
- [Security](https://drop.ciphera.net/security) - Technical architecture and encryption details
- [FAQ](https://drop.ciphera.net/faq) - Common questions about file expiry and limitations

## Core Features

- **End-to-End Encryption**: AES-256-GCM encryption in the browser.
- **Zero Knowledge**: We never see your decryption keys.
- **Burn on Read**: Files can be set to self-destruct after one download.
- **Secure File Requests**: Receive files securely from others.
